title: The BIZARRE Connection Between UFOs and Nukes
summary: This interview excerpt discusses a 1964 incident at Vandenberg Air Force Base where Lieutenant Bob Jacobs, a photo instrumentation specialist, allegedly captured footage of a UFO interfering with a nuclear warhead test during the classified Atlas program. The object reportedly fired directed energy beams at the missile, causing it to tumble off trajectory.

acronyms.definition: An unidentified aerial phenomenon or craft

events.description: Lieutenant Bob Jacobs allegedly filmed a UFO interfering with a dummy nuclear warhead test at Vandenberg Air Force Base during the classified Atlas program

key_claims.claim: A flying saucer traveling at 8,000 miles per hour encircled a test missile and fired four directed energy beams at it, causing the warhead to tumble off its intended trajectory
Lieutenant Bob Jacobs was tasked with filming the Atlas missile test from Big Sur, approximately 100 miles north of Vandenberg Air Force Base
